source: Mordor Intelligence - Spain Courier, Express, and Parcel Market
stat: Spain's CEP market was valued at USD 4.39 billion in 2025, projected to reach USD 5.48 billion by 2031 (3.67% CAGR).
Spanish parcel volumes rose +8.2% in 2024 with +7.8% further volume growth projected for 2025.

source: Mordor Intelligence - Spain E-commerce Logistics Market
stat: B2C parcels held 50.78% of Spain's CEP market share in 2025, with the B2C segment growing an estimated +10.1% year over year.
Out-of-home (PUDO/locker) delivery grew +15.5% in 2024, outperforming the overall market average and signalling a shift away from home delivery for some segments.

source: Mordor Intelligence - Spain E-commerce Logistics Market
stat: Spain has 89,038 active online retailers shipping over 1.2 billion parcels/year, with e-commerce volume CAGR of ~14.3% from 2019-2024.
